title: Rabbit's Amplified Tech
description: Explore a beautiful amplified world with amazing scenery, planes, guns, automated machinery, enhanced vanilla, and many other ways to lively up your high-heights experience.
body:
An inspiration by the existence of the amzing AmpXtreme mod.

**This modpack includes almost anything that you could ask for in a mountainous, amplified, tech based pack. It includes dozens of vanilla-enhancing mods to create a surreal experience in crafting, UI, audio, game-feel, and scenery. And since the design of this modpack was intended for the production of a minecraft server, there is no shortage of optimizations to ensure that your game can keep up with the taxing periperhals. The technology, planes, spacecraft, and other content give the player an entertainment deeper in their world to work towards, and more specifically to learn to apply to their environment.**

**A reccomendation of the configuration of the mod called "Bobby" is strictly suggested to all players regardless of their system, since it's settings largely affect the rendering of chunks, which can ruin or gain performance. Search up tutorials or check the modpage on modrinth if the settings are too confusing, or cause troubleshooting.**
